NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF PERRY E. RHOADS IN SUPPORT THEREOF (TRANSACTION ID # 100053417) FILED BY PETITIONER DROMHUS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DROMHUS, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR. DROMHUS FAILS TO SHOW THAT IT PROPERLY SERVED THE PETITION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1290.4. PARAGRAPH 12 OF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT REFERS TO SERVICE OF A NOTICE OF DEFAULT. IT DOES NOT GOVERN SERVICE OF THIS PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. DROMHUS ALSO FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE PROPER SUBSTITUTE SERVICE. THE DECLARATION OF ANNA GATTI STATES THAT MS. GATTI RESIDES IN FLORENCE, ITALY AND NEVER RESIDED AT THE 690 MARKET STREET ADDRESS. DROMHUS FAILED TO EFFECTUATE PROPER SERVICE IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 1290.4 OR 415.20, AND/OR THE HAGUE CONVENTION. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Declration Of Perry E. Rhoads In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Perry Rhoads, Esq. 213-229-0100 of Robinson Di Lando APLC for Petitioner through Court Call.
John Domingue, Esq. 408-495-3900 of Rossi Dominue Fox for Petitioner through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER DROMHUS, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Grant. No opposition or petition to vacate filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION / Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Perry Rhoads, Esq. 213-229-0100 of Robinson Di Lando APLC for Petitioner through Court Call.
No other Appearance.***

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court inquires re: insufficient service. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DROMHUS, INC.'s Hearing For Right To Attach Order And And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Off calendar. Petitioner Dromhus, Inc. has not filed a proof of service showing service of the petition to confirm arbitration award on Respondent Anna Gatti. Petitioner also failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.7(B).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

***Respondent Anna Gatti, Respondent in Pro Per checked in through Court Call at 9:25 am but hung up after the tentative ruling was read to her verbatim and was not present when the case was called.***

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Perry E. Rhoads In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anna Gatti, telephone 415-697-9026, apearing in Pro Per; (CourtCall)
No other appearances;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Dromhus, Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is off calendar. Dromhus fails to show that it properly served the petition in compliance with CCP 1290.4. Paragraph 12 of the parties' settlement agreement refers to service of a notice of default. It does not govern service of this petition to confirm arbitration award. Dromhus also fails to demonstrate proper substitute service. The declaration of Anna Gatti states that Ms. Gatti resides in Florence, Italy and never resided at the 690 Market Street address. Dromhus failed to effectuate proper service in accordance with CCP 1290.4 or 415.20, and/or the Hague Convention.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With Award; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Perry Rhoads, Esq. 213-229-0100 of Robinson Di Lando for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Anna Gatti 415-697-9026 (415-225-9031) Defendant in Pro Per through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Staff Attorney speaks to both parties prior to the hearing re: a continuance. During the hearing, loud music could be heard on Court Call. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DROMHUS, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformance With Award.

Off calendar; for Proper Proof of Service.***

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)

***At the Conclusion of the hearing, the clerk calls Mr. Rhoades to inform him of the ruling. The clerk also leaves a message for Anna Gatti re: the Court's ruling.***
